overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit commercial district in Night City. The player moves through wet streets lined with holographic advertisements and market stalls, ascending to an upper walkway before entering a narrow passage between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with wet cobblestones and food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow neon-lit street, passing food stalls on the right

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the food stall counter

entered.detail: large circular neon sign with red and white rings mounted on building facade
street food vendor stall with bright blue and yellow neon lighting
reflective wet cobblestone pavement showing neon reflections
metal walkway bridge spanning across the street above

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow, wet cobblestone street in a cyberpunk city at night. A large circular neon sign dominates the left building while food stalls with bright neon lighting line the right side. The player walks forward through the moderate crowd browsing the stalls, with an overhead metal bridge visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: market square with illuminated staircase and striped stall

events.description: exits narrow street into more open market area with illuminated staircase ahead
begins ascending the illuminated stairs toward the upper walkway

agents.ego_description: approaching and climbing the illuminated staircase while passing the striped market stall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian browsing goods at the striped market stall

entered.detail: market stall with green and white striped canopy and hanging merchandise
wide staircase with cyan neon edge lighting leading upward
high-rise building facade with vertical holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a market square with a distinctive green and white striped stall on the left. The player approaches and begins ascending a wide staircase illuminated with cyan neon lights. A tall glass building with vertical holographic displays rises on the right, and the sky becomes partially visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with holographic billboards and illuminated trees

events.description: reaches top of stairs entering elevated walkway with large vertical holographic advertisements
large red holographic advertisement illuminates the right side with bright crimson light

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway passing illuminated cherry trees and large holographic ads

entered.detail: tall vertical holographic display showing animated pink and cyan advertisements
trees with pink illuminated blossoms lining the left side of the walkway
large vertical red holographic advertisement with 'SMOOTH SKIN DESIRE' text

segments.scene_description: Having ascended the stairs, the player walks along an elevated concrete walkway lined with pink illuminated cherry trees on the left. Massive vertical holographic billboards dominate the right side, including a prominent red advertisement that begins illuminating the area with crimson light around the 45-second mark. The space is more open with sparse pedestrian presence.

events.description: enters narrow alley between buildings, view becomes restricted by walls
moves into tight corridor with limited forward visibility

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow passage between tall buildings, view restricted to gaps ahead

entered.detail: tall concrete walls of adjacent buildings creating a narrow passage
smooth concrete wall with metal railings on the right side of the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow alley between high-rise buildings, with concrete walls closing in on both sides. The large red holographic advertisement is now visible only through a distant gap on the right. The environment becomes enclosed and sheltered, with no vegetation or other pedestrians present, creating a claustrophobic corridor leading forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit commercial district that transitions from a crowded street market into a claustrophobic urban corridor. It begins on a narrow, wet cobblestone street where the camera moves past bright food stalls and a large circular neon sign toward a distant metal bridge. As the path opens into a market square, the camera ascends a wide staircase illuminated by cyan lights, passing a tall glass building with vertical holographic displays. The scene then shifts to an elevated concrete walkway lined with pink cherry trees, where the environment becomes more open and is bathed in the crimson glow of massive red holographic billboards. Finally, the camera turns away from the open vista and enters a narrow alley between high-rise buildings, where the concrete walls close in to create a sheltered, enclosed corridor.
